title: introducer _ucs2 not working
description:
SELECT HEX(_ucs2"HELLO"), HEX(CONVERT("HELLO" USING ucs2));
+-------------------+----------------------------------+
| HEX(_ucs2"HELLO") | HEX(CONVERT("HELLO" USING ucs2)) |
+-------------------+----------------------------------+
| 0048454C4C4F      | 00480045004C004C004F             |
+-------------------+----------------------------------+

_ucs2 seems to apply to only the first character; seems like it should apply to the entire string.
https://stackoverflow.com/questions/69775663/mysql-char-lengthstr-sometimes-produces-diffe...
How to repeat:
SELECT HEX(_ucs2"HELLO"), HEX(CONVERT("HELLO" USING ucs2));
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, str_col String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT hex(str_col) AS hex_str_col, hex(reinterpretAsString(str_col)) AS hex_converted FROM test_strings;
ALTER TABLE test_strings UPDATE str_col = NULL WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, length(str_col) AS str_length, hex(reinterpretAsString(str_col)) AS hex_converted FROM test_strings WHERE str_col IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: _ucs2 applies only to the first character
